text:
Task 1 [CRITICAL] — Hardcoded password shipped in JS bundle. Department: Frontend. File/Component: src/lib/managementAccess.ts. Recommended Action: Remove password; implement real server-side authentication
(Entra ID / SSO). Estimated Hours: 16. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Hardcoded password shipped in JS bundle
metadata.action:
Remove password; implement real server-side authentication
(Entra ID / SSO)

text:
Task 2 [CRITICAL] — Document Inbox and Detail routes fully unprotected. Department: Frontend. File/Component: src/pages/DocumentInbox.tsx,
DocumentDetail.tsx. Recommended Action: Gate or protect all routes server-side once real auth is in place. Estimated Hours: 6. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Document Inbox and Detail routes fully unprotected
metadata.action: Gate or protect all routes server-side once real auth is in place

text: Task 3 [HIGH] — No Authorization headers on proxy calls. Department: Frontend. File/Component: src/lib/aiExtraction.ts. Recommended Action: Send Bearer token or session cookie on every sensitive request. Estimated Hours: 10. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No Authorization headers on proxy calls
metadata.action: Send Bearer token or session cookie on every sensitive request

text:
Task 4 [HIGH] — VITE_* env vars embedded in client build. Department: Frontend. File/Component: vite.config.ts / .env. Recommended Action: Treat all VITE_* values as public; inject runtime config via
trusted server endpoint. Estimated Hours: 4. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: VITE_* env vars embedded in client build
metadata.action:
Treat all VITE_* values as public; inject runtime config via
trusted server endpoint

text: Task 5 [MEDIUM] — Unencrypted PII in localStorage / sessionStorage. Department: Frontend. File/Component: AppContext.tsx, multiple pages. Recommended Action: Minimise PII in browser storage; clear on logout. Estimated Hours: 2. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Minimise PII in browser storage; clear on logout

text: Task 6 [MEDIUM] — Dev server binds to all interfaces (host: "::"). Department: Frontend. File/Component: vite.config.ts. Recommended Action: Restrict to 127.0.0.1 outside shared dev environments. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Dev server binds to all interfaces (host: "::")
metadata.action: Restrict to 127.0.0.1 outside shared dev environments

text:
Task 7 [CRITICAL] — Large Component Refactor. Department: Frontend. File/Component: src/pages/DocumentDetail.tsx,
src/pages/DocumentInbox.tsx. Recommended Action: Split line component into features/hooks/services/components. Estimated Hours: 26. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Split line component into features/hooks/services/components

text:
Task 8 [MEDIUM] — React-router open redirect CVEs. Department: Frontend. File/Component: package.json — react-router
6.30.1. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 6.30.4. Estimated Hours: 0.5. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 6.30.4

text: Task 9 [MEDIUM] — postcss XSS via style tags. Department: Frontend. File/Component: package.json — postcss 8.5.6. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 8.5.10. Estimated Hours: 0.5. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 8.5.10

text:
Task 10 [HIGH] — Five HIGH CVEs in @xmldom/xmldom. Department: Frontend. File/Component: package.json —
@xmldom/xmldom 0.8.11. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 0.8.13 (0.8.x) or 0.9.10 (0.9.x). Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

Task 11 [HIGH] — XSS in @remix-run/router. Department: Frontend. File/Component: package.json —
@remix-run/router 1.23.0. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 1.23.2. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 1.23.2

text:
Task 12 [CRITICAL] — Management gate is client-side only
(sessionStorage). Department: Backend. File/Component: src/lib/managementAccess.ts,
Sidebar.tsx. Recommended Action: Move auth enforcement to backend; treat frontend gate as UX
only. Estimated Hours: 14. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Move auth enforcement to backend; treat frontend gate as UX
only

text:
Task 13 [CRITICAL] — Unauthenticated management unlock function. Department: Backend. File/Component: src/lib/managementAccess.ts:16. Recommended Action: Add server-side auth check, rate limiting and audit log before
unlock is granted. Estimated Hours: 5. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Add server-side auth check, rate limiting and audit log before
unlock is granted

text:
Task 14 [CRITICAL] — AI proxy has no authentication. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs — all
endpoints. Recommended Action: Require signed JWT or API key verified server-side on every
endpoint. Estimated Hours: 7. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Require signed JWT or API key verified server-side on every
endpoint

text:
Task 15 [HIGH] — CORS origin derived from user input. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs:21, :67. Recommended Action: Replace with a fixed server-side origin allowlist; never derive
from request. Estimated Hours: 8. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: CORS origin derived from user input
metadata.action:
Replace with a fixed server-side origin allowlist; never derive
from request

text: Task 16 [HIGH] — Arbitrary code execution in lodash. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — lodash 4.17.21. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 4.18.1 (fixes all 3 lodash CVEs). Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 4.18.1 (fixes all 3 lodash CVEs)

text: Task 17 [HIGH] — Command injection via glob. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — glob 10.4.5. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 10.5.0. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 10.5.0

text: Task 18 [HIGH] — ReDoS in minimatch (3 CVEs). Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — minimatch 9.0.5. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 9.0.7. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 9.0.7

text: Task 19 [HIGH] — ReDoS / injection in picomatch. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — picomatch 2.3.1. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 2.3.2. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 2.3.2

text: Task 20 [HIGH] — Prototype pollution + ReDoS in xlsx. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — xlsx 0.18.5. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 0.20.2. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 0.20.2

text: Task 21 [MEDIUM] — Verbose error responses leak stack traces. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs. Recommended Action: Return generic errors to clients; write detail to internal logs only. Estimated Hours: 4. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Verbose error responses leak stack traces
metadata.action: Return generic errors to clients; write detail to internal logs only

text:
Task 22 [MEDIUM] — ReDoS via non-literal RegExp. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs,
src/lib/remarkDetection.ts. Recommended Action: Replace dynamic RegExp() with literal patterns or validated
input. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Replace dynamic RegExp() with literal patterns or validated
input

text: Task 23 [MEDIUM] — uuid output buffer issue. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — uuid 8.3.2. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 14.0.0. Estimated Hours: 1.5. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 14.0.0

text:
Task 24 [MEDIUM] — brace-expansion DoS. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — brace-expansion
2.0.2. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 2.0.3. Estimated Hours: 0.5. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 2.0.3

text: Task 25 [MEDIUM] — yaml DoS via nested parsing. Department: Backend. File/Component: package.json — yaml 2.6.0. Recommended Action: Upgrade to 2.8.3. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Upgrade to 2.8.3

text:
Task 26 [CRITICAL] — No authentication on AI proxy endpoints. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs. Recommended Action: Add JWT or API key validation middleware before any route
handler. Estimated Hours: 10. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No authentication on AI proxy endpoints
metadata.action:
Add JWT or API key validation middleware before any route
handler

text: Task 27 [HIGH] — No HTTPS/TLS enforcement in server logic. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs. Recommended Action: Enforce HTTPS at infrastructure level; reject plain HTTP. Estimated Hours: 6. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No HTTPS/TLS enforcement in server logic
metadata.action: Enforce HTTPS at infrastructure level; reject plain HTTP

text: Task 28 [MEDIUM] — Monolithic ~4,500-line proxy file. Department: Backend. File/Component: server/ai-proxy.mjs. Recommended Action: Refactor into route modules and service layers. Estimated Hours: 22. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Refactor into route modules and service layers

text:
Task 29 [CRITICAL] — No Row-Level Security — all users see all rows. Department: Database. File/Component: Azure SQL — all customer tables. Recommended Action: Implement RLS predicates using SESSION_CONTEXT per
tenant. Estimated Hours: 24. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No Row-Level Security — all users see all rows
metadata.action:
Implement RLS predicates using SESSION_CONTEXT per
tenant

text:
Task 30 [CRITICAL] — No Column-Level Security on sensitive fields. Department: Database. File/Component: Azure SQL — pricing, PII
columns. Recommended Action: Apply CLS via DENY grants or dynamic data masking. Estimated Hours: 16. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No Column-Level Security on sensitive fields
metadata.action: Apply CLS via DENY grants or dynamic data masking

text: Task 31 [MEDIUM] — Missing NOT NULL constraints on business columns. Department: Database. File/Component: Azure SQL schema. Recommended Action: Enforce NOT NULL and CHECK constraints on critical columns. Estimated Hours: 10. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Missing NOT NULL constraints on business columns
metadata.action: Enforce NOT NULL and CHECK constraints on critical columns

text: Task 32 [MEDIUM] — Foreign key gaps on junction and audit tables. Department: Database. File/Component: Azure SQL schema. Recommended Action: Add referential integrity constraints to all junction tables. Estimated Hours: 17. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Foreign key gaps on junction and audit tables
metadata.action: Add referential integrity constraints to all junction tables

text:
Task 33 [MEDIUM] — No soft-delete pattern. Department: Database. File/Component: Azure SQL schema. Recommended Action: Add DeletedAt column and view-level filtering for legal hold
entities. Estimated Hours: 19. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Add DeletedAt column and view-level filtering for legal hold
entities

text: Task 34 [CRITICAL] — Container process runs as root. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Dockerfile:19. Recommended Action: Add USER nonroot directive. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Add USER nonroot directive

text:
Task 35 [CRITICAL] — No CI/CD pipeline. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: GitHub / repository. Recommended Action: Set up GitHub Actions pipeline with build, test, security gate
stages. Estimated Hours: 8. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Set up GitHub Actions pipeline with build, test, security gate
stages

text: Task 36 [HIGH] — No secret scanning gate in pipeline. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: GitHub Actions. Recommended Action: Add Gitleaks step; fail build on detected secrets. Estimated Hours: 4. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No secret scanning gate in pipeline
metadata.action: Add Gitleaks step; fail build on detected secrets

text: Task 37 [HIGH] — No dependency scanning gate in pipeline. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: GitHub Actions. Recommended Action: Add Trivy step; fail build on HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs. Estimated Hours: 4. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No dependency scanning gate in pipeline
metadata.action: Add Trivy step; fail build on HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs

text:
Task 38 [HIGH] — Secrets managed via .env files. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: server/.env, container env. Recommended Action: Migrate all secrets to Azure Key Vault; inject at runtime via
Managed Identity. Estimated Hours: 6. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Migrate all secrets to Azure Key Vault; inject at runtime via
Managed Identity

text: Task 39 [HIGH] — No secret rotation policy. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Azure / Key Vault. Recommended Action: Define rotation schedule; enforce via Key Vault rotation policies. Estimated Hours: 1. Status: Must have.

metadata.action: Define rotation schedule; enforce via Key Vault rotation policies

text:
Task 40 [HIGH] — No RBAC governance across Azure resources. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Azure subscription. Recommended Action: Enforce least-privilege RBAC per resource; replace IP
whitelisting with private endpoints. Estimated Hours: 6. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: No RBAC governance across Azure resources
metadata.action:
Enforce least-privilege RBAC per resource; replace IP
whitelisting with private endpoints

text: Task 41 [HIGH] — Database access via informal IP whitelist. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Azure SQL firewall. Recommended Action: Replace with VNet private endpoint and Managed Identity auth. Estimated Hours: 5. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: Database access via informal IP whitelist
metadata.action: Replace with VNet private endpoint and Managed Identity auth

text:
Task 42 [HIGH] — No environment separation. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Azure resources. Recommended Action: Create separate resource groups for Dev/Preview, Staging and
Production. Estimated Hours: 12. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Create separate resource groups for Dev/Preview, Staging and
Production

text:
Task 43 [MEDIUM] — No centralised logging or monitoring. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Azure / application. Recommended Action: Set up Log Analytics workspace, Application Insights and
metric-based alerting. Estimated Hours: 15. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Set up Log Analytics workspace, Application Insights and
metric-based alerting

text:
Task 44 [MEDIUM] — SPA and API bundled in single Dockerfile. Department: DevOps / Infra. File/Component: Dockerfile. Recommended Action: Separate frontend and backend into independent containers
which increases security. Estimated Hours: 9. Status: Must have.

metadata.finding: SPA and API bundled in single Dockerfile
metadata.action:
Separate frontend and backend into independent containers
which increases security

text:
Task 45 [CRITICAL] — Hardcoded credential in source code. Department: Cyber
Security. File/Component: src/lib/managementAccess.ts:2. Recommended Action: Rotate immediately; remove from source and git history (git
filter-repo); store in Azure Key Vault. Estimated Hours: 6. Status: Must have.

metadata.action:
Rotate immediately; remove from source and git history (git
filter-repo); store in Azure Key Vault
